assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen renders the feed stack, on-track badge, and inline ask affordances
assertionResults.title: renders the feed stack, on-track badge, and inline ask affordances

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen shows the ask box and light practice instead of a dead-end on an empty feed
assertionResults.title: shows the ask box and light practice instead of a dead-end on an empty feed

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen renders the Support hub Mentor variant without loading the Me feed
assertionResults.title: renders the Support hub Mentor variant without loading the Me feed

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen routes Support hub cockpit actions through the selected person scope
assertionResults.title: routes Support hub cockpit actions through the selected person scope

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen renders the person-scope Mentor variant without loading the Me feed
assertionResults.title: renders the person-scope Mentor variant without loading the Me feed

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen surfaces the school-day-evening homework highlight above the feed, tappable to camera [T11]
assertionResults.title: surfaces the school-day-evening homework highlight above the feed, tappable to camera [T11]

assertionResults.fullName: MentorScreen hides the homework highlight on a weekend [T11]

assertionResults.title: closed-catalog-named-subject-jump — routes a confident named subject to its hub
